title: Infosys and AWS collaborate to accelerate enterprise adoption of generative AI
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Amazon Web Services to accelerate enterprise adoption of generative AI. The initiative combines Infosys Topaz with Amazon Q Developer to enhance Infosys internal operations and support customer innovation across sectors including manufacturing, telecom, financial services, and consumer goods. Infosys said the integration supports software development lifecycle tasks such as automated documentation, code generation, debugging, testing, and legacy code modernization, while also applying generative AI to HR, recruitment, sales, and vendor management. Infosys is also using AWS generative AI services, including Amazon Bedrock, for industry solutions such as real-time personalized engagement in sports and entertainment.
